source_note: 12-month period ending Dec 31, 2019. Business filings rose 2.5% from 22,232 to 22,780. Chapter breakdowns in press releases are totals (business + nonbusiness) so business-only by chapter left blank. Source: uscourts.gov press release Jan 28, 2020.

12-month period ending Dec 31, 2020. Business filings down from 22,780; note Ch 11 TOTAL (bus+nonbus) rose 18.7% to 8,333 in 2020 (of which 7,786 were business reorganizations per the press release). Source: uscourts.gov press release Jan 28, 2021.
12-month period ending Dec 31, 2021. Business filings fell 33.7% from 21,655 to 14,347 (pandemic stimulus). Source: uscourts.gov press release Feb 4, 2022.
12-month period ending Dec 31, 2022. Business filings fell 6% from 14,347. Source: uscourts.gov press release Feb 6, 2023.
12-month period ending Dec 31, 2023. Business filings rose 40.4% from 13,481. Source: uscourts.gov press release Jan 26, 2024.
12-month period ending Dec 31, 2024. Business filings rose 22.1% from 18,926. Source: uscourts.gov press release Feb 4, 2025.
Trailing 12 months ending Mar 31, 2025. +14.7% YoY. Source: uscourts.gov press release May 1, 2025.
Trailing 12 months ending Jun 30, 2025. +4.5% YoY. Source: uscourts.gov press release Jul 31, 2025.
Trailing 12 months ending Sep 30, 2025. +5.6% YoY. Source: uscourts.gov press release Nov 24, 2025.
12-month period ending Dec 31, 2025. Business filings rose 7.1% from 23,107. Source: uscourts.gov press release Feb 4, 2026.
